creator: martinp@tildeslash.com
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #4)

It seems that the configure script didn't found some prerequisite tool and returned "no", which was stored as path to that (pre-requisite) command and executed by make, which produced the error.

I never saw this error before and it builds fine on my system, please can you attach the config.log from the build machine which produced this error?

Best regards,
Martin
